full: For I, Yahweh your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you, ‘Don’t be afraid. I will help you.’
short: For I, Yahweh your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you, ‘Don’t be afraid.

full: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God.
short: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God.

full: Also delight yourself in Yahweh, and he will give you the desires of your heart.
short: Also delight yourself in Yahweh, and he will give you the desires of your heart.

full: Bearing with one another, and forgiving each other, if any man has a complaint against any; even as Christ forgave you, so you also do.
short: Bearing with one another, and forgiving each other…

full: I have hidden your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you.
short: I have hidden your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you.

full: He has said to me, “My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.” Most gladly therefore I will rather glory in my weaknesses, that the power of Christ may rest on me.
short: He has said to me, “My grace is sufficient for you…

full: Therefore I take pleasure in weaknesses, in injuries, in necessities, in persecutions, in distresses, for Christ’s sake. For when I am weak, then am I strong.
short: Therefore I take pleasure in weaknesses, in injuries, in necessities…

full: Not by works of righteousness which we did ourselves, but according to his mercy, he saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewing by the Holy Spirit.
short: Not by works of righteousness which we did ourselves, but according to his mercy…

full: I will sing of the loving kindness of Yahweh forever. With my mouth, I will make known your faithfulness to all generations.
short: I will sing of the loving kindness of Yahweh forever.

full: Walk in love, even as Christ also loved you, and gave himself up for us, an offering and a sacrifice to God for a sweet-smelling fragrance.
short: Walk in love, even as Christ also loved you, and gave himself up for us…

full: My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.
short: My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.

full: Don’t you be afraid, for I am with you. Don’t be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes, I will help you. Yes, I will uphold you with the right hand of my righteousness.
short: Don’t you be afraid, for I am with you.

full: And be kind to one another, tender hearted, forgiving each other, just as God also in Christ forgave you.
short: And be kind to one another, tender hearted, forgiving each other…

full: The Yahweh’s ransomed ones will return, and come with singing to Zion; and everlasting joy will be on their heads. They will obtain gladness and joy, and sorrow and sighing will flee away.”
short: The Yahweh’s ransomed ones will return…

full: For Yahweh God is a sun and a shield. Yahweh will give grace and glory. He withholds no good thing from those who walk blamelessly.
short: For Yahweh God is a sun and a shield.

full: Happy is he who has the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in Yahweh, his God.
short: Happy is he who has the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in Yahweh, his God.

full: From the end of the earth, I will call to you, when my heart is overwhelmed. Lead me to the rock that is higher than I.
short: From the end of the earth, I will call to you, when my heart is overwhelmed.

full: And whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord, and not for men.
short: And whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord, and not for men.

full: Yahweh will fulfill that which concerns me; your loving kindness, Yahweh, endures forever. Don’t forsake the works of your own hands.
short: Yahweh will fulfill that which concerns me; your loving kindness, Yahweh…

full: Yet I will rejoice in Yahweh. I will be joyful in the God of my salvation!
short: Yet I will rejoice in Yahweh. I will be joyful in the God of my salvation!

full: Be strong and courageous. Don’t be afraid or scared of them; for Yahweh your God himself is who goes with you. He will not fail you nor forsake you.”
short: Be strong and courageous.

full: Yahweh appeared of old to me, saying, “Yes, I have loved you with an everlasting love. Therefore I have drawn you with loving kindness.
short: Yahweh appeared of old to me, saying, “Yes…

full: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight, Yahweh, my rock, and my redeemer.
short: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight…

full: Commit your deeds to Yahweh, and your plans shall succeed.
short: Commit your deeds to Yahweh, and your plans shall succeed.

full: Praise Yah, for it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant and fitting to praise him.
short: Praise Yah…

full: Put on therefore, as God’s chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion, kindness, lowliness, humility, and perseverance.
short: Put on therefore, as God’s chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion…

full: The eternal God is your dwelling place. Underneath are the everlasting arms. He thrust out the enemy from before you, and said, ‘Destroy!’
short: The eternal God is your dwelling place.

full: Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.
short: Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock…

full: Yahweh will keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forward, and forever more.
short: Yahweh will keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forward…

full: Yahweh is on my side. I will not be afraid. What can man do to me?
short: Yahweh is on my side. I will not be afraid. What can man do to me?

full: I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart. I will tell of all your marvelous works.
short: I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart.

full: Who comforts us in all our affliction, that we may be able to comfort those who are in any affliction, through the comfort with which we ourselves are comforted by God.
short: Who comforts us in all our affliction…

full: Finally, be strong in the Lord, and in the strength of his might.
short: Finally, be strong in the Lord, and in the strength of his might.

full: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty.
short: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty.

full: The righteous cry, and Yahweh hears, and delivers them out of all their troubles.
short: The righteous cry, and Yahweh hears, and delivers them out of all their troubles.

full: But you, Lord, are a merciful and gracious God, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness and truth.
short: But you, Lord, are a merciful and gracious God, slow to anger…

full: We know that all things work together for good for those who love God, to those who are called according to his purpose.
short: We know that all things work together for good for those who love God…

full: Cause me to hear your loving kindness in the morning, for I trust in you. Cause me to know the way in which I should walk, for I lift up my soul to you.
short: Cause me to hear your loving kindness in the morning, for I trust in you.

full: Haven’t I commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Don’t be afraid. Don’t be dismayed, for Yahweh your God is with you wherever you go.”
short: Haven’t I commanded you?

full: Casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.
short: Casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.

full: Oh come, let’s sing to Yahweh. Let’s shout aloud to the rock of our salvation!
short: Oh come, let’s sing to Yahweh. Let’s shout aloud to the rock of our salvation!

full: Therefore let us also, seeing we are surrounded by so great a cloud of witnesses, lay aside every weight and the sin which so easily entangles us, and let us run with perseverance the race that is set before us.
short: Therefore let us also, seeing we are surrounded by so great a cloud of witnesses…

full: We love him, because he first loved us.
short: We love him, because he first loved us.

full: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer lives. In the end, he will stand upon the earth.
short: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer lives.

full: Brothers, I don’t regard myself as yet having taken hold, but one thing I do. Forgetting the things which are behind, and stretching forward to the things which are before.
short: Brothers, I don’t regard myself as yet having taken hold, but one thing I do.

full: God, you are my God. I will earnestly seek you. My soul thirsts for you. My flesh longs for you, in a dry and weary land, where there is no water.
short: God, you are my God.

full: With all lowliness and humility, with patience, bearing with one another in love.
short: With all lowliness and humility, with patience, bearing with one another in love.

full: And when you turn to the right hand, and when you turn to the left, your ears will hear a voice behind you, saying, “This is the way. Walk in it.”
short: And when you turn to the right hand, and when you turn to the left…

full: “Can a woman forget her nursing child, that she should not have compassion on the son of her womb? Yes, these may forget, yet I will not forget you!
short: “Can a woman forget her nursing child…

full: Guide me in your truth, and teach me, for you are the God of my salvation, I wait for you all day long.
short: Guide me in your truth, and teach me, for you are the God of my salvation…

full: Where could I go from your Spirit? Or where could I flee from your presence?
short: Where could I go from your Spirit? Or where could I flee from your presence?

full: But God, being rich in mercy, for his great love with which he loved us.
short: But God, being rich in mercy, for his great love with which he loved us.

full: So, then, my beloved brothers, let every man be swift to hear, slow to speak, and slow to anger.
short: So, then, my beloved brothers, let every man be swift to hear, slow to speak…

full: Looking to Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith, who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising its shame, and has sat down at the right hand of the throne of God.
short: Looking to Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith…

full: I am the vine. You are the branches. He who remains in me, and I in him, the same bears much fruit, for apart from me you can do nothing.
short: I am the vine.

full: God sets the lonely in families. He brings out the prisoners with singing, but the rebellious dwell in a sun-scorched land.
short: God sets the lonely in families.

full: The grass withers, the flower fades; but the word of our God stands forever.”
short: The grass withers, the flower fades; but the word of our God stands forever.”

full: Praise Yahweh, my soul! All that is within me, praise his holy name!
short: Praise Yahweh, my soul! All that is within me, praise his holy name!

full: Teach me to do your will, for you are my God. Your Spirit is good. Lead me in the land of uprightness.
short: Teach me to do your will, for you are my God.

full: He who calls you is faithful, who will also do it.
short: He who calls you is faithful, who will also do it.

full: But be doers of the word, and not only hearers, deluding your own selves.
short: But be doers of the word, and not only hearers, deluding your own selves.

full: For we walk by faith, not by sight.
short: For we walk by faith, not by sight.

full: He gives power to the weak. He increases the strength of him who has no might.
short: He gives power to the weak. He increases the strength of him who has no might.

full: But seek first God’s Kingdom, and his righteousness; and all these things will be given to you as well.
short: But seek first God’s Kingdom…

full: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.
short: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.

full: Yahweh, in the morning you shall hear my voice. In the morning I will lay my requests before you, and will watch expectantly.
short: Yahweh, in the morning you shall hear my voice.

full: Rejoice always.
short: Rejoice always.

full: But if any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God, who gives to all liberally and without reproach; and it will be given to him.
short: But if any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God…

full: See how great a love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of God! For this cause the world doesn’t know us, because it didn’t know him.
short: See how great a love the Father has given to us…

full: Praise Yahweh, my soul, and don’t forget all his benefits.
short: Praise Yahweh, my soul, and don’t forget all his benefits.

full: ‘Call to me, and I will answer you, and will show you great and difficult things, which you don’t know.’
short: ‘Call to me, and I will answer you, and will show you great and difficult things…

full: If a man prevails against one who is alone, two shall withstand him; and a threefold cord is not quickly broken.
short: If a man prevails against one who is alone…

full: Pleasant words are a honeycomb, sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.
short: Pleasant words are a honeycomb, sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.

full: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all you who hope in Yahweh.
short: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all you who hope in Yahweh.

full: Blessed are those who mourn, for they shall be comforted.
short: Blessed are those who mourn, for they shall be comforted.

full: But as for me, I am like a green olive tree in God’s house. I trust in God’s loving kindness forever and ever.
short: But as for me, I am like a green olive tree in God’s house.

full: Your loving kindness, Yahweh, is in the heavens. Your faithfulness reaches to the skies.
short: Your loving kindness, Yahweh, is in the heavens.

full: Looking at them, Jesus said, “With men this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.”
short: Looking at them, Jesus said, “With men this is impossible…

full: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.
short: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.

full: “Yahweh is my portion,” says my soul. “Therefore I will hope in him.”
short: “Yahweh is my portion,” says my soul. “Therefore I will hope in him.”

full: Wait for Yahweh. Be strong, and let your heart take courage. Yes, wait for Yahweh.
short: Wait for Yahweh. Be strong, and let your heart take courage. Yes, wait for Yahweh.

full: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good; for his loving kindness endures forever.
short: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good; for his loving kindness endures forever.

full: Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.
short: Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.

full: But now, Yahweh, you are our Father. We are the clay, and you our potter. We all are the work of your hand.
short: But now, Yahweh, you are our Father.

full: This is the boldness which we have toward him, that, if we ask anything according to his will, he listens to us.
short: This is the boldness which we have toward him, that…

full: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me. Your rod and your staff, they comfort me.
short: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil…

full: In the multitude of my thoughts within me, your comforts delight my soul.
short: In the multitude of my thoughts within me, your comforts delight my soul.

full: But those who wait for Yahweh will renew their strength. They will mount up with wings like eagles. They will run, and not be weary. They will walk, and not faint.
short: But those who wait for Yahweh will renew their strength.

full: I wait for Yahweh. My soul waits. I hope in his word.
short: I wait for Yahweh. My soul waits. I hope in his word.

full: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear, because fear has punishment. He who fears is not made perfect in love.
short: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear…

full: And God is able to make all grace abound to you, that you, always having all sufficiency in everything, may abound to every good work.
short: And God is able to make all grace abound to you, that you…

full: Bear one another’s burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.
short: Bear one another’s burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.

full: Let each man give according as he has determined in his heart; not grudgingly, or under compulsion; for God loves a cheerful giver.
short: Let each man give according as he has determined in his heart; not grudgingly…

full: But now faith, hope, and love remain—these three. The greatest of these is love.
short: But now faith, hope, and love remain—these three. The greatest of these is love.

full: But I will always hope, and will add to all of your praise.
short: But I will always hope, and will add to all of your praise.

full: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead.
short: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ…

full: He has shown you, O man, what is good. What does Yahweh require of you, but to act justly, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with your God?
short: He has shown you, O man, what is good.

full: Yahweh is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness.
short: Yahweh is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness.

full: They are new every morning. Great is your faithfulness.
short: They are new every morning. Great is your faithfulness.

full: A man’s heart plans his course, but Yahweh directs his steps.
short: A man’s heart plans his course, but Yahweh directs his steps.

full: Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that works in us.
short: Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think…

full: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faith.
short: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faith.

full: Therefore my heart is glad, and my tongue rejoices. My body shall also dwell in safety.
short: Therefore my heart is glad, and my tongue rejoices.

full: Oh taste and see that Yahweh is good. Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.
short: Oh taste and see that Yahweh is good. Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.

full: In love of the brothers be tenderly affectionate to one another; in honor preferring one another.
short: In love of the brothers be tenderly affectionate to one another; in honor preferring one another.

full: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! His greatness is unsearchable.
short: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! His greatness is unsearchable.

full: And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.
short: And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding…

full: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his loving kindness toward those who fear him.
short: For as the heavens are high above the earth…

full: For by grace you have been saved through faith, and that not of yourselves; it is the gift of God.
short: For by grace you have been saved through faith…

full: While we don’t look at the things which are seen, but at the things which are not seen. For the things which are seen are temporal, but the things which are not seen are eternal.
short: While we don’t look at the things which are seen…

full: Behold, I will do a new thing. It springs out now. Don’t you know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.
short: Behold, I will do a new thing.

full: Yahweh is gracious, merciful, slow to anger, and of great loving kindness.
short: Yahweh is gracious, merciful, slow to anger, and of great loving kindness.

full: Seek Yahweh and his strength. Seek his face forever more.
short: Seek Yahweh and his strength. Seek his face forever more.

full: Rejoice in the Lord always! Again I will say, “Rejoice!”
short: Rejoice in the Lord always! Again I will say, “Rejoice!”

full: Yahweh will give strength to his people. Yahweh will bless his people with peace.
short: Yahweh will give strength to his people. Yahweh will bless his people with peace.

full: Rejoicing in hope; enduring in troubles; continuing steadfastly in prayer.
short: Rejoicing in hope; enduring in troubles; continuing steadfastly in prayer.

full: For the mountains may depart, and the hills be removed; but my loving kindness will not depart from you, and my covenant of peace will not be removed,” says Yahweh who has mercy on you.
short: For the mountains may depart…

full: Above all these things, walk in love, which is the bond of perfection.
short: Above all these things, walk in love, which is the bond of perfection.

full: You will know the truth, and the truth will make you free.”
short: You will know the truth, and the truth will make you free.”

full: Ruth said, “Don’t urge me to leave you, and to return from following you, for where you go, I will go; and where you stay, I will stay. Your people will be my people, and your God my God.
short: Ruth said, “Don’t urge me to leave you, and to return from following you…

full: So then, let us follow after things which make for peace, and things by which we may build one another up.
short: So then, let us follow after things which make for peace…

full: So teach us to count our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom.
short: So teach us to count our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom.

full: Beloved, let us love one another, for love is of God; and everyone who loves has been born of God, and knows God.
short: Beloved, let us love one another…

full: “This is my commandment, that you love one another, even as I have loved you.
short: “This is my commandment, that you love one another, even as I have loved you.

full: But as for me, I will look to Yahweh. I will wait for the God of my salvation. My God will hear me.
short: But as for me, I will look to Yahweh.

full: “As you would like people to do to you, do exactly so to them.
short: “As you would like people to do to you, do exactly so to them.

full: You will show me the path of life. In your presence is fullness of joy. In your right hand there are pleasures forever more.
short: You will show me the path of life.

full: You shall call on me, and you shall go and pray to me, and I will listen to you.
short: You shall call on me, and you shall go and pray to me, and I will listen to you.

full: “For I, Yahweh, don’t change; therefore you, sons of Jacob, are not consumed.
short: “For I, Yahweh, don’t change; therefore you, sons of Jacob, are not consumed.

full: Know therefore that Yahweh your God himself is God, the faithful God, who keeps covenant and loving kindness with them who love him and keep his commandments to a thousand generations.
short: Know therefore that Yahweh your God himself is God, the faithful God…

full: “Don’t let your heart be troubled. Believe in God. Believe also in me.
short: “Don’t let your heart be troubled. Believe in God. Believe also in me.

full: So is my word that goes out of my mouth: it will not return to me void, but it will accomplish that which I please, and it will prosper in the thing I sent it to do.
short: So is my word that goes out of my mouth: it will not return to me void…

full: Therefore accept one another, even as Christ also accepted you, to the glory of God.
short: Therefore accept one another, even as Christ also accepted you, to the glory of God.

full: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you,” says Yahweh, “thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you hope and a future.
short: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you,” says Yahweh, “thoughts of peace…

full: Even so, let your light shine before men; that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father who is in heaven.
short: Even so, let your light shine before men; that they may see your good works…

full: He will wipe away every tear from their eyes. Death will be no more; neither will there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain, any more. The first things have passed away.”
short: He will wipe away every tear from their eyes.

full: Therefore, my beloved brothers, be steadfast, immovable, always abounding in the Lord’s work, because you know that your labor is not in vain in the Lord.
short: Therefore, my beloved brothers, be steadfast, immovable…

full: I will say of Yahweh, “He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in whom I trust.”
short: I will say of Yahweh, “He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in whom I trust.”

full: He who sits on the throne said, “Behold, I am making all things new.” He said, “Write, for these words of God are faithful and true.”
short: He who sits on the throne said, “Behold, I am making all things new.” He said…

full: Those who sow in tears will reap in joy.
short: Those who sow in tears will reap in joy.

full: Yah is my strength and song. He has become my salvation.
short: Yah is my strength and song. He has become my salvation.

full: The liberal soul shall be made fat. He who waters shall be watered also himself.
short: The liberal soul shall be made fat. He who waters shall be watered also himself.

full: I delight to do your will, my God. Yes, your law is within my heart.”
short: I delight to do your will, my God. Yes, your law is within my heart.”

full: You are the light of the world. A city located on a hill can’t be hidden.
short: You are the light of the world. A city located on a hill can’t be hidden.

full: Iron sharpens iron; so a man sharpens his friend’s countenance.
short: Iron sharpens iron; so a man sharpens his friend’s countenance.

full: I have been crucified with Christ, and it is no longer I that live, but Christ lives in me. That life which I now live in the flesh, I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself up for me.
short: I have been crucified with Christ, and it is no longer I that live…

full: “Be still, and know that I am God. I will be exalted among the nations. I will be exalted in the earth.”
short: “Be still, and know that I am God.

full: A friend loves at all times; and a brother is born for adversity.
short: A friend loves at all times; and a brother is born for adversity.

full: I will bless Yahweh at all times. His praise will always be in my mouth.
short: I will bless Yahweh at all times. His praise will always be in my mouth.

full: Therefore we don’t faint, but though our outward man is decaying, yet our inward man is renewed day by day.
short: Therefore we don’t faint, but though our outward man is decaying…

full: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, into his courts with praise. Give thanks to him, and bless his name.
short: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, into his courts with praise.

full: And hope doesn’t disappoint us, because God’s love has been poured out into our hearts through the Holy Spirit who was given to us.
short: And hope doesn’t disappoint us…

full: I press on toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.
short: I press on toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

full: You will keep whoever’s mind is steadfast in perfect peace, because he trusts in you.
short: You will keep whoever’s mind is steadfast in perfect peace, because he trusts in you.

full: We know and have believed the love which God has for us. God is love, and he who remains in love remains in God, and God remains in him.
short: We know and have believed the love which God has for us.

full: As the deer pants for the water brooks, so my soul pants after you, God.
short: As the deer pants for the water brooks, so my soul pants after you, God.

full: When I am afraid, I will put my trust in you.
short: When I am afraid, I will put my trust in you.

full: Because your loving kindness is better than life, my lips shall praise you.
short: Because your loving kindness is better than life, my lips shall praise you.

full: Let everything that has breath praise Yah! Praise Yah!
short: Let everything that has breath praise Yah! Praise Yah!

full: In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God.
short: In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving…

full: As far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.
short: As far as the east is from the west…

full: There is therefore now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus, who don’t walk according to the flesh, but according to the Spirit.
short: There is therefore now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus…

full: May He grant you your heart’s desire, and fulfill all your counsel.
short: May He grant you your heart’s desire, and fulfill all your counsel.

full: It is because of Yahweh’s loving kindnesses that we are not consumed, because his compassion doesn’t fail.
short: It is because of Yahweh’s loving kindnesses that we are not consumed…

full: Again, therefore, Jesus spoke to them, saying, “I am the light of the world. He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.”
short: Again, therefore, Jesus spoke to them, saying, “I am the light of the world.

full: There are many plans in a man’s heart, but Yahweh’s counsel will prevail.
short: There are many plans in a man’s heart, but Yahweh’s counsel will prevail.

full: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared before that we would walk in them.
short: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works…

full: Let all that you do be done in love.
short: Let all that you do be done in love.

full: Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, then I will come in to him, and will dine with him, and he with me.
short: Behold, I stand at the door and knock.

full: Yahweh is good to those who wait for him, to the soul who seeks him.
short: Yahweh is good to those who wait for him, to the soul who seeks him.

full: Each of you not just looking to his own things, but each of you also to the things of others.
short: Each of you not just looking to his own things…

full: Therefore exhort one another, and build each other up, even as you also do.
short: Therefore exhort one another, and build each other up, even as you also do.

full: The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness hasn’t overcome it.
short: The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness hasn’t overcome it.

full: “Ask, and it will be given you. Seek, and you will find. Knock, and it will be opened for you.
short: “Ask, and it will be given you.

full: Yah is my strength and song. He has become my salvation. This is my God, and I will praise him; my father’s God, and I will exalt him.
short: Yah is my strength and song.

full: Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering; for he who promised is faithful.
short: Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering; for he who promised is faithful.

full: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time.
short: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God…

full: Yahweh, the Lord, is my strength. He makes my feet like deer’s feet, and enables me to go in high places. For the music director, on my stringed instruments.
short: Yahweh, the Lord, is my strength.

full: In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep, for you, Yahweh alone, make me live in safety.
short: In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep, for you, Yahweh alone…

full: In all things I gave you an example, that so laboring you ought to help the weak, and to remember the words of the Lord Jesus, that he himself said, ‘It is more blessed to give than to receive.’”
short: In all things I gave you an example, that so laboring you ought to help the weak…

full: Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart; and you will find rest for your souls.
short: Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me…

full: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in all ways. The Lord be with you all.
short: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in all ways.

full: Now faith is assurance of things hoped for, proof of things not seen.
short: Now faith is assurance of things hoped for, proof of things not seen.

full: ‘Yahweh bless you, and keep you. Yahweh make his face to shine on you, and be gracious to you. Yahweh lift up his face toward you, and give you peace.’
short: ‘Yahweh bless you, and keep you.

full: Jesus said to him, “If you can believe, all things are possible to him who believes.”
short: Jesus said to him, “If you can believe, all things are possible to him who believes.”

full: You have turned my mourning into dancing for me. You have removed my sackcloth, and clothed me with gladness.
short: You have turned my mourning into dancing for me.

full: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst after righteousness, for they shall be filled.
short: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst after righteousness…

full: Rest in Yahweh, and wait patiently for him. Don’t fret because of him who prospers in his way, because of the man who makes wicked plots happen.
short: Rest in Yahweh, and wait patiently for him.

full: Yahweh is good to all. His tender mercies are over all his works.
short: Yahweh is good to all. His tender mercies are over all his works.

full: Being therefore justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ.
short: Being therefore justified by faith…

full: Don’t let kindness and truth forsake you. Bind them around your neck. Write them on the tablet of your heart.
short: Don’t let kindness and truth forsake you.

full: I can do all things through Christ, who strengthens me.
short: I can do all things through Christ, who strengthens me.

full: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.
short: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.

full: Strength and dignity are her clothing. She laughs at the time to come.
short: Strength and dignity are her clothing. She laughs at the time to come.

full: But you, Yahweh, are a shield around me, my glory, and the one who lifts up my head.
short: But you, Yahweh, are a shield around me, my glory, and the one who lifts up my head.

full: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body; and be thankful.
short: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts…

full: Every Scripture is God-breathed and profitable for teaching, for reproof, for correction, and for instruction in righteousness.
short: Every Scripture is God-breathed and profitable for teaching, for reproof…

full: Jesus, looking at them, said, “With men it is impossible, but not with God, for all things are possible with God.”
short: Jesus, looking at them, said, “With men it is impossible, but not with God…

full: My flesh and my heart fails, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.
short: My flesh and my heart fails…

full: But may the God of all grace, who called you to his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after you have suffered a little while, perfect, establish, strengthen, and settle you.
short: But may the God of all grace, who called you to his eternal glory by Christ Jesus…

full: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.
short: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

full: Watch! Stand firm in the faith! Be courageous! Be strong!
short: Watch! Stand firm in the faith! Be courageous! Be strong!

full: Let love be without hypocrisy. Abhor that which is evil. Cling to that which is good.
short: Let love be without hypocrisy. Abhor that which is evil. Cling to that which is good.

full: But God commends his own love toward us, in that while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us.
short: But God commends his own love toward us, in that while we were yet sinners…

full: Trust in Yahweh, and do good. Dwell in the land, and enjoy safe pasture.
short: Trust in Yahweh, and do good. Dwell in the land, and enjoy safe pasture.

full: No one has seen God at any time. If we love one another, God remains in us, and his love has been perfected in us.
short: No one has seen God at any time.

full: Behold, God is my salvation. I will trust, and will not be afraid; for Yah, Yahweh, is my strength and song; and he has become my salvation.”
short: Behold, God is my salvation.

full: “Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.
short: “Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.

full: This hope we have as an anchor of the soul, a hope both sure and steadfast and entering into that which is within the veil.
short: This hope we have as an anchor of the soul…

full: Yahweh himself is who goes before you. He will be with you. He will not fail you nor forsake you. Don’t be afraid. Don’t be discouraged.”
short: Yahweh himself is who goes before you.

full: For Yahweh gives wisdom. Out of his mouth comes knowledge and understanding.
short: For Yahweh gives wisdom. Out of his mouth comes knowledge and understanding.

full: Therefore if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation. The old things have passed away. Behold, all things have become new.
short: Therefore if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation.

full: Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.
short: Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.

full: But let him ask in faith, without any doubting, for he who doubts is like a wave of the sea, driven by the wind and tossed.
short: But let him ask in faith, without any doubting…

full: A man’s goings are established by Yahweh. He delights in his way.
short: A man’s goings are established by Yahweh. He delights in his way.

full: As therefore you received Christ Jesus, the Lord, walk in him.
short: As therefore you received Christ Jesus, the Lord, walk in him.

full: Because he has turned his ear to me, therefore I will call on him as long as I live.
short: Because he has turned his ear to me, therefore I will call on him as long as I live.

full: See how good and how pleasant it is for brothers to live together in unity!
short: See how good and how pleasant it is for brothers to live together in unity!

full: Jesus said to her, “I am the resurrection and the life. He who believes in me will still live, even if he dies.
short: Jesus said to her, “I am the resurrection and the life.

full: But exhort one another day by day, so long as it is called “today”; lest any one of you be hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.
short: But exhort one another day by day…

full: I waited patiently for Yahweh. He turned to me, and heard my cry.
short: I waited patiently for Yahweh. He turned to me, and heard my cry.

full: Let us therefore draw near with boldness to the throne of grace, that we may receive mercy, and may find grace for help in time of need.
short: Let us therefore draw near with boldness to the throne of grace…

full: For Yahweh’s word is right. All his work is done in faithfulness.
short: For Yahweh’s word is right. All his work is done in faithfulness.

full: And Yahweh will guide you continually, and satisfy your soul in dry places, and make your bones strong; and you shall be like a watered garden, and like a spring of water, whose waters don’t fail.
short: And Yahweh will guide you continually, and satisfy your soul in dry places…

full: Yahweh, your God, is among you, a mighty one who will save. He will rejoice over you with joy. He will calm you in his love. He will rejoice over you with singing.
short: Yahweh, your God, is among you, a mighty one who will save.

full: Let us consider how to provoke one another to love and good works.
short: Let us consider how to provoke one another to love and good works.

full: My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.
short: My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.

full: But let all those who take refuge in you rejoice, let them always shout for joy, because you defend them. Let them also who love your name be joyful in you.
short: But let all those who take refuge in you rejoice, let them always shout for joy…

full: Commit your way to Yahweh. Trust also in him, and he will do this.
short: Commit your way to Yahweh. Trust also in him, and he will do this.

full: But he knows the way that I take. When he has tried me, I shall come out like gold.
short: But he knows the way that I take. When he has tried me, I shall come out like gold.

full: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly; in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your heart to the Lord.
short: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly; in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another with psalms…

full: Yahweh is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; and he knows those who take refuge in him.
short: Yahweh is good…

full: Why are you in despair, my soul? Why are you disturbed within me? Hope in God! For I shall still praise him, the saving help of my countenance, and my God.
short: Why are you in despair, my soul?

full: Sing to Yahweh a new song, for he has done marvelous things! His right hand, and his holy arm, have worked salvation for him.
short: Sing to Yahweh a new song, for he has done marvelous things!

full: I am still confident of this: I will see the goodness of Yahweh in the land of the living.
short: I am still confident of this: I will see the goodness of Yahweh in the land of the living.

full: I will also give you a new heart, and I will put a new spirit within you. I will take away the stony heart out of your flesh, and I will give you a heart of flesh.
short: I will also give you a new heart, and I will put a new spirit within you.

full: Two are better than one, because they have a good reward for their labor.
short: Two are better than one, because they have a good reward for their labor.

full: But the path of the righteous is like the dawning light, that shines more and more until the perfect day.
short: But the path of the righteous is like the dawning light…

full: Therefore I tell you, all things whatever you pray and ask for, believe that you have received them, and you shall have them.
short: Therefore I tell you, all things whatever you pray and ask for…

full: Therefore don’t be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Each day’s own evil is sufficient.
short: Therefore don’t be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself.

full: Cast your burden on Yahweh, and he will sustain you. He will never allow the righteous to be moved.
short: Cast your burden on Yahweh, and he will sustain you.

full: I love Yahweh, because he listens to my voice, and my cries for mercy.
short: I love Yahweh, because he listens to my voice, and my cries for mercy.

full: Don’t be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
short: Don’t be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.

full: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom. Your dominion endures throughout all generations. Yahweh is faithful in all his words, and loving in all his deeds.
short: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom.

full: How precious is your loving kindness, God! The children of men take refuge under the shadow of your wings.
short: How precious is your loving kindness, God!

full: May be strengthened to comprehend with all the saints what is the width and length and height and depth.
short: May be strengthened to comprehend with all the saints what is the width and length and height and depth.

full: For Yahweh is good. His loving kindness endures forever, his faithfulness to all generations.
short: For Yahweh is good.

full: Let the favor of the Lord our God be on us; establish the work of our hands for us; yes, establish the work of our hands.
short: Let the favor of the Lord our God be on us; establish the work of our hands for us; yes…

full: Doing nothing through rivalry or through conceit, but in humility, each counting others better than himself.
short: Doing nothing through rivalry or through conceit, but in humility…

full: “Give, and it will be given to you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over, will be given to you. For with the same measure you measure it will be measured back to you.”
short: “Give, and it will be given to you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together…

full: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; and through the rivers, they will not overflow you. When you walk through the fire, you will not be burned, and flame will not scorch you.
short: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; and through the rivers…

full: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope, in the power of the Holy Spirit.
short: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing…

full: For God so loved the world, that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish, but have eternal life.
short: For God so loved the world, that he gave his one and only Son…

full: He heals the broken in heart, and binds up their wounds.
short: He heals the broken in heart, and binds up their wounds.

full: Yahweh is near to those who have a broken heart, and saves those who have a crushed spirit.
short: Yahweh is near to those who have a broken heart…

full: I have told you these things, that in me you may have peace. In the world you have oppression; but cheer up! I have overcome the world.”
short: I have told you these things, that in me you may have peace.

full: “Blessed is the man who trusts in Yahweh, and whose confidence is in Yahweh.
short: “Blessed is the man who trusts in Yahweh, and whose confidence is in Yahweh.

full: Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of lights, with whom can be no variation, nor turning shadow.
short: Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above…

full: See if there is any wicked way in me, and lead me in the everlasting way.
short: See if there is any wicked way in me, and lead me in the everlasting way.

full: For your great loving kindness reaches to the heavens, and your truth to the skies.
short: For your great loving kindness reaches to the heavens, and your truth to the skies.

full: Love is patient and is kind; love doesn’t envy. Love doesn’t brag, is not proud.
short: Love is patient and is kind; love doesn’t envy. Love doesn’t brag, is not proud.

full: Keep your heart with all diligence, for out of it is the wellspring of life.
short: Keep your heart with all diligence, for out of it is the wellspring of life.

full: For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there I am in the middle of them.”
short: For where two or three are gathered together in my name…

full: What then shall we say about these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?
short: What then shall we say about these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?

full: Create in me a clean heart, O God. Renew a right spirit within me.
short: Create in me a clean heart, O God. Renew a right spirit within me.

full: Behold, I am with you, and will keep you, wherever you go, and will bring you again into this land. For I will not leave you, until I have done that which I have spoken of to you.”
short: Behold, I am with you, and will keep you, wherever you go…

full: For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which will be revealed toward us.
short: For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which will be revealed toward us.

full: I will give thanks to you, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Your works are wonderful. My soul knows that very well.
short: I will give thanks to you, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made.

full: For I am persuaded that neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities, nor things present, nor things to come, nor powers.
short: For I am persuaded that neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities…

full: For if they fall, the one will lift up his fellow; but woe to him who is alone when he falls, and doesn’t have another to lift him up.
short: For if they fall…

full: You shall seek me, and find me, when you search for me with all your heart.
short: You shall seek me, and find me, when you search for me with all your heart.

full: A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.
short: A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.

full: Finally, be all like-minded, compassionate, loving as brothers, tender hearted, courteous.
short: Finally, be all like-minded, compassionate, loving as brothers, tender hearted…

full: And above all things be earnest in your love among yourselves, for love covers a multitude of sins.
short: And above all things be earnest in your love among yourselves…

full: Let us not be weary in doing good, for we will reap in due season, if we don’t give up.
short: Let us not be weary in doing good, for we will reap in due season…

full: Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory in great joy.
short: Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling…

full: No, in all these things, we are more than conquerors through him who loved us.
short: No, in all these things, we are more than conquerors through him who loved us.

full: Return to your rest, my soul, for Yahweh has dealt bountifully with you.
short: Return to your rest, my soul, for Yahweh has dealt bountifully with you.

full: Yahweh’s name is a strong tower: the righteous run to him, and are safe.
short: Yahweh’s name is a strong tower: the righteous run to him, and are safe.

full: My soul, wait in silence for God alone, for my expectation is from him.
short: My soul, wait in silence for God alone, for my expectation is from him.

full: Yahweh is my strength and my shield. My heart has trusted in him, and I am helped. Therefore my heart greatly rejoices. With my song I will thank him.
short: Yahweh is my strength and my shield.

full: For nothing spoken by God is impossible.”
short: For nothing spoken by God is impossible.”

full: The work of righteousness will be peace; and the effect of righteousness, quietness and confidence forever.
short: The work of righteousness will be peace; and the effect of righteousness…

full: In the day that I called, you answered me. You encouraged me with strength in my soul.
short: In the day that I called, you answered me.

full: Peace I leave with you. My peace I give to you; not as the world gives, give I to you. Don’t let your heart be troubled, neither let it be fearful.
short: Peace I leave with you.

full: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another. Just as I have loved you, you also love one another.
short: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another.

full: Then he said to them, “Go your way. Eat the fat, drink the sweet, and send portions to him for whom nothing is prepared, for today is holy to our Lord. Don’t be grieved, for the joy of Yahweh is your strength.”
short: Then he said to them, “Go your way.

full: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies and God of all comfort.
short: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ…

full: Show me your ways, Yahweh. Teach me your paths.
short: Show me your ways, Yahweh. Teach me your paths.

full: Strengthened with all power, according to the might of his glory, for all endurance and perseverance with joy.
short: Strengthened with all power, according to the might of his glory…

full: Bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things.
short: Bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things.

full: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you shall go. I will counsel you with my eye on you.
short: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you shall go.

full: Search me, God, and know my heart. Try me, and know my thoughts.
short: Search me, God, and know my heart. Try me, and know my thoughts.

full: But the Lord is faithful, who will establish you, and guard you from the evil one.
short: But the Lord is faithful, who will establish you, and guard you from the evil one.

full: This is the day that Yahweh has made. We will rejoice and be glad in it!
short: This is the day that Yahweh has made. We will rejoice and be glad in it!

full: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
short: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

full: Sing to Yahweh a new song! Sing to Yahweh, all the earth.
short: Sing to Yahweh a new song! Sing to Yahweh, all the earth.

full: Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.
short: Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.

full: My soul rests in God alone. My salvation is from him.
short: My soul rests in God alone. My salvation is from him.

full: Our soul has waited for Yahweh. He is our help and our shield.
short: Our soul has waited for Yahweh. He is our help and our shield.

full: Let your loving kindness be on us, Yahweh, since we have hoped in you.
short: Let your loving kindness be on us, Yahweh, since we have hoped in you.

full: Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding.
short: Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding.

full: Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you. Cleanse your hands, you sinners; and purify your hearts, you double-minded.
short: Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you.

full: Yahweh will also be a high tower for the oppressed; a high tower in times of trouble.
short: Yahweh will also be a high tower for the oppressed; a high tower in times of trouble.

full: Gentleness, and self-control. Against such things there is no law.
short: Gentleness, and self-control. Against such things there is no law.

full: Even to old age I am he, and even to gray hairs I will carry you. I have made, and I will bear. Yes, I will carry, and will deliver.
short: Even to old age I am he, and even to gray hairs I will carry you.

full: For God didn’t give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.
short: For God didn’t give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.

full: Those ransomed by Yahweh will return, and come with singing to Zion; and everlasting joy shall be on their heads. They will obtain gladness and joy. Sorrow and sighing shall flee away.
short: Those ransomed by Yahweh will return…

full: Yahweh will keep you from all evil. He will keep your soul.
short: Yahweh will keep you from all evil. He will keep your soul.

full: Oh give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.
short: Oh give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

full: Don’t be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind, so that you may prove what is the good, well-pleasing, and perfect will of God.
short: Don’t be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind…

full: Yahweh will fight for you, and you shall be still.”
short: Yahweh will fight for you, and you shall be still.”

full: Be free from the love of money, content with such things as you have, for he has said, “I will in no way leave you, neither will I in any way forsake you.”
short: Be free from the love of money, content with such things as you have…

full: For his anger is but for a moment. His favor is for a lifetime. Weeping may stay for the night, but joy comes in the morning.
short: For his anger is but for a moment.

full: The thief only comes to steal, kill, and destroy. I came that they may have life, and may have it abundantly.
short: The thief only comes to steal, kill, and destroy.

full: He will cover you with his feathers. Under his wings you will take refuge. His faithfulness is your shield and rampart.
short: He will cover you with his feathers.

full: But his delight is in Yahweh’s law. On his law he meditates day and night.
short: But his delight is in Yahweh’s law. On his law he meditates day and night.

full: You open your hand, and satisfy the desire of every living thing.
short: You open your hand, and satisfy the desire of every living thing.

full: Yahweh is my light and my salvation. Whom shall I fear? Yahweh is the strength of my life. Of whom shall I be afraid?
short: Yahweh is my light and my salvation.

full: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.
short: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.

full: Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
short: Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.

full: Being confident of this very thing, that he who began a good work in you will complete it until the day of Jesus Christ.
short: Being confident of this very thing…

full: It is a good thing to give thanks to Yahweh, to sing praises to your name, Most High.
short: It is a good thing to give thanks to Yahweh, to sing praises to your name, Most High.

full: I have set Yahweh always before me. Because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.
short: I have set Yahweh always before me.

full: Many waters can’t quench love, neither can floods drown it. If a man would give all the wealth of his house for love, he would be utterly scorned.
short: Many waters can’t quench love, neither can floods drown it.
